<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# attractor-web

Leptos v0.7 web interface for Attractor workspace IDE. Renders project sidebar, document viewer with live reload, pipeline execution panel, and persistent WebSocket terminals. Compiles to WASM hydrate target for browser and SSR binary for Axum server.

## Contents

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml): Package manifest defining `ssr` and `hydrate` feature flags, Leptos 0.7 dependencies, workspace links to `attractor-pipeline`, `attractor-dot`, `attractor-types`.
- [Leptos.toml](./Leptos.toml): Framework configuration with `site-root="target/site"`, `style-file="style/main.scss"`, `bin-features=["ssr"]`, `lib-features=["hydrate"]`.
- [package.json](./package.json): NPM manifest for @xterm/xterm, @xterm/addon-fit, @xterm/addon-web-links.
- [src/lib.rs](./src/lib.rs): Library entry exporting `App` component and `hydrate()` function gated by `#[cfg(feature = "hydrate")]`.
- [src/app.rs](./src/app.rs): Root `App()` component managing `RwSignal<Vec<Project>>` state, rendering `ProjectSidebar` and `ProjectView`, auto-selecting first project via `Effect::new`.
- [src/main.rs](./src/main.rs): SSR bootstrap initializing SQLite at `$HOME/.pas/web.db`, mounting Axum routes `/api/terminal/ws`, `/api/documents/stream`, `/api/stream/{session_id}`.
- [style/main.scss](./style/main.scss): Catppuccin Mocha theme defining `$base: #1e1e2e`, `.app-workspace` flex layout, `.execution-node` state variants.

## Subdirectories

- [src/](./src/): Application source split into `components/` (Leptos UI) and `server/` (API handlers). `app.rs` composes sidebar and view. `main.rs` starts Axum. `lib.rs` exports `hydrate()` for WASM target.
- [src/components/](./src/components/): Leptos UI modules. `ProjectSidebar` signals `projects` and `active_project_id`. `Terminal` invokes `window.initTerminal` with `container_id` format `"terminal-{project_id}"` and 50ms `setTimeout` delay. `DocumentViewer` subscribes to `/api/documents/stream`. `ApprovalBar` triggers `start_execution`.
- [src/server/](./src/server/): Backend implementation. `db.rs` runs `init_db()` with schema creating `projects`, `documents` tables. `documents.rs` spawns `notify::RecommendedWatcher` for `.pas/` directories. `execute.rs` runs `pas decompose` → `pas scaffold` → `run_pipeline_with_streaming`, publishing `node_start`/`node_complete` events. `terminal.rs` manages `portable-pty` sessions with 30-minute idle reaper. `projects.rs` exports `list_open_projects`, `open_project`, `close_project`; template header content: [src/server/projects.annex.sum](./src/server/projects.annex.sum).
- [style/](./style/): SCSS assets. `main.scss` defines color tokens, grid layouts, component states.
- [public/js/](./public/js/): Static assets. `xterm-setup.js` implements `window.initTerminal` for WebSocket PTY integration.

## Stack

- **Framework**: Leptos 0.7 with `ssr` and `hydrate` features. Reactive state via `RwSignal`, `Resource`, `Action`, `Effect`.
- **Server**: Axum 0.7 with `leptos_axum` integration, `Router`, `State<AppState>`, SSE via `tokio::sync::broadcast` (capacity 100).
- **Database**: SQLite via `sqlx::SqlitePool` at `$HOME/.pas/web.db` with `mode=rwc`.
- **File Watching**: `notify` crate `RecommendedWatcher` with `NonRecursive` mode for `.pas/prd.md` and `.pas/spec.md`.
- **Terminal**: `portable-pty` 0.9 `MasterPty` with WebSocket wire protocol (JSON session init, binary I/O).
- **External**: `pas` CLI binary for `decompose`, `scaffold` subcommands. xterm.js 5.5.0 via CDN.

## API Surface

**Component Exports**:
- `App() -> impl IntoView` from `lib.rs`

**Leptos Server Functions**:
- `list_open_projects() -> Vec<Project>`
- `open_project(folder_path: String) -> Project`
- `close_project(project_id: i64)`
- `get_cached_documents(project_id: i64) -> CachedDocs`
- `list_directory(path: String) -> Vec<DirEntry>`
- `start_execution(project_id: i64) -> ExecutionResponse` (returns `session_id`, `epic_id`, `pipeline_path`)

**HTTP Endpoints** (`main.rs`):
- `GET /api/terminal/ws` — WebSocket PTY upgrade
- `GET /api/documents/stream?project_id={id}` — SSE document updates
- `GET /api/stream/{session_id}` — SSE pipeline execution events

**Shared State** (`server/mod.rs`):
- `db: SqlitePool`
- `watchers: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<i64, Arc<DocumentWatcher>>>>`
- `terminal_sessions: TerminalSessions`

## Patterns

- **SSR/Hydrate Gate**: `main.rs` contains `#[cfg(feature = "ssr")]` server logic; `lib.rs` contains `#[cfg(feature = "hydrate")]` `hydrate()` function. Non-SSR builds compile empty `main`.
- **Signal-Driven UI**: `app.rs` uses `RwSignal<Vec<Project>>` for workspace list, `Resource<(), _>` for async loading, `Effect::new` for auto-selection side effects.
- **Leptos Server Functions**: Frontend calls `#[server]` functions defined in `server/` submodules; functions extract `Extension<AppState>` via `leptos_axum::extract()`.
- **Lazy Watcher Init**: `server/documents.rs` populates `AppState.watchers` HashMap on first SSE connection per project ID.
- **Session-Based Streaming**: `server/stream.rs` maintains `SESSION_STATE` DashMap with 100-event ring buffer per session; `publish_event` broadcasts to `tokio::sync::broadcast` channels.
- **Persistent PTY**: `server/terminal.rs` stores `TerminalSession` in `AppState.terminal_sessions` with `Duration::from_secs(30 * 60)` idle timeout.

## File Relationships

- `app.rs` composes `ProjectSidebar` and `ProjectView` (from `components/layout.rs`), embedding `Terminal`, `DocumentViewer`, and `ExecutionPanel`.
- `app.rs` calls `list_open_projects` via `load_action` resource defined in `server/projects.rs`.
- `main.rs` imports `attractor_web::server` module re-exported by `lib.rs`, mounting `ws_terminal` (from `server/terminal.rs`), `document_stream` (from `server/documents.rs`), and `stream_events` (from `server/stream.rs`).
- `components/document_viewer.rs` consumes `get_cached_documents` (from `server/projects.rs`) and SSE from `/api/documents/stream`.
- `components/execution_panel.rs` consumes SSE from `/api/stream/{session_id}` (from `server/stream.rs`).
- `components/approval_bar.rs` triggers `start_execution` (from `server/execute.rs`).
- `components/folder_picker.rs` and `components/project_sidebar.rs` call `list_directory`, `open_project`, `close_project` (from `server/projects.rs`).
- `server/execute.rs` parses DOT via `attractor_dot::parse` and executes via `attractor_pipeline::PipelineGraph::from_dot`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**CSS Class Patterns**:
- Workspace layout: `.app-workspace`, `.workspace-content`, `.empty-state`, `.project-view-wrapper`
- Terminal container ID format: `"terminal-{project_id}"`
- Color tokens: `$primary: #89b4fa`, `$success: #a6e3a1`, `$error: #f38ba8`, `$base: #1e1e2e`, `$mantle: #181825`
- Execution node states: `.in-progress` (pulsing), `.success`, `.failed`, `.skipped` (opacity 0.5)
- Layout constants: `$radius: 8px`, `$radius-sm: 4px`, sidebar width 220px, responsive breakpoint `@media (min-width: 1800px)`

**URL Patterns**:
- Terminal WebSocket: `/api/terminal/ws`
- Documents SSE: `/api/documents/stream?project_id={}`
- Pipeline SSE: `/api/stream/{session_id}`

**Panic Strings** (`main.rs`):
- Database initialization failure: `"Failed to initialize database"`
- Address bind conflict: `"Failed to bind to {addr}: {e}. Is another instance already running?"`

**Terminal Wire Protocol** (`server/terminal.rs`):
- Session initialization: `{"type":"session","session_id":"<uuid>"}`
- Resize command: `{"type":"resize","cols":N,"rows":N}`
- Binary frames for PTY I/O
- Idle timeout: `Duration::from_secs(30 * 60)` (30 minutes)

**xterm.js Integration**:
- CDN URL: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xterm/xterm@5.5.0/css/xterm.min.css`
- Initialization delay: 50ms `setTimeout` in `components/terminal.rs`

**Database Schema Defaults** (`server/db.rs`):
- Timestamp default: `datetime('now')` for `last_used`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
- Unique constraint: `folder_path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE`

**Execution Event Schemas** (`server/execute.rs`):
- Start: `{"type": "node_start", "node_id": "...", "label": "..."}`
- Complete: `{"type": "node_complete", "node_id": "...", "status": "...", "cost_usd": ..., "notes": "..."}`
- Pipeline End: `{"type": "pipeline_complete", "total_cost_usd": ..., "completed_nodes": [...]}`

**Status String Mappings**:
- `Success` → `"success"`
- `PartialSuccess` → `"partial_success"`
- `Retry` → `"retry"`
- `Fail` → `"fail"`
- `Skipped` → `"skipped"`

**Auto-Selection Logic** (`app.rs`):
- On `load_action` resolution: `if let Some(first) = loaded.first() { active_project_id.set(Some(first.id)); }`

**Hidden File Filter** (`server/projects.rs`):
- Excludes entries where `name_str.starts_with('.')`
- Injects parent entry `".."` when `dir_path.parent().is_some()`

**Annex References**:
- Template header content: [src/server/projects.annex.sum](./src/server/projects.annex.sum)
